chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.183 of 2022 [Azar Wahab Kalwar & others v. Imran Nawaz & others] ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For order on Nazir Report dt 6.7.22 2.For order on office objection a/w reply at A 3.For hg of CMA No.2174/22 4.For hg of CMA No.2175/22 5.For hg of main case 6.For hg of CMA No.1673/22 15.04.2025. Mr. Talha Javed, advocate for appellants. Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, advocate for respondent No. 1. After hearing the parties, this appeal is disposed of in the terms whereby the impugned order is set aside and the learned trial Court is directed to decide application under Order 39 Rules 1 & 2 read with Section 151 CPC and application under Order 18 Rule 18 read with Section 151 CPC within a period of two months on hearing the parties without fail. The appeal is accordingly disposed of in above terms along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
